headline: Here is why AON is among the Best Pet Care Stocks to Buy for Consistent Recurring Revenue
summary: With a short percentage of shares outstanding of 1.40%, Aon plc (NYSE:AON) is among the 7 Best Pet Care Stocks to Buy for Consistent Recurring Revenue. On June 16, UBS lowered its price target on Aon plc (NYSE:AON) to $360 from $385 while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. The adjustment reflects the firm’s updated expectations […]
